description: Extract deontic modality (obligation, permission, prohibition) from NZ legislation. Essential for corpus-law-nz binding obligation detection.
oracle_notes: Track 10 completed. modality.py (198 lines): DeonticModalityDetector with @Language.factory, scope resolution, token extensions. effects.py (92 lines): LegalEffect enum (7 LKIF categories), classify_legal_effect() with spaCy pipeline + regex fallback. 67 new tests (40 modality + 27 effects) all passing. serialization.py and pipeline_api.py updated with deontic_modality and legal_effect fields.
